micro_rules: Never invent service names outside the provided service_list_snippet.
Use value entries in conditions and function entries in actions.
Return exactly one JSON object only with keys name, cron, period, code.

rows.command_eng: If the audio recorder is recording, stop recording and save as test.mp3; otherwise, start recording.
rows.output: {"name":"Stop recording and save as test.mp3, otherwise start recording","cron":"","period":0,"code":"if ((#AudioRecorder).audiorecorder_recordstatus == \"recording\") { (#AudioRecorder).audiorecorder_recordstop(\"test.mp3\") } else { (#AudioRecorder).audiorecorder_recordstart() }"}

rows.command_kor: 녹음기가 녹음중이면 녹음을 중지하고 test.mp3로 저장해줘. 녹음중이 아니면 녹음을 시작해줘.
